errorDetails.message: Backup Vault managed identity requires Reader role on the Kubernetes cluster.
recommendedAction: Assign Reader role to the managed identity of the Backup Vault on the Kubernetes cluster. For more information, refer to https://Sanitized.ms/aksclusterbackup

additionalInfo.DetailedNonLocalisedMessage:
The client 'f5275cc6-0ab2-4b45-8f8e-b3bf3e1ec5a2' with object id 'bda6f389-83ac-4cd1-946b-bfd7ce0d0ca5' does not have authorization to perform action 'Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters/read' over scope '/subscriptions/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/resourceGroups/shashargea/providers/Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters/shashaeatest' or the scope is invalid. If access was recently granted, please refresh your credentials.
Status: 403 (Forbidden)
ErrorCode: AuthorizationFailed

If access was recently granted, please refresh your credentials."}}

errorDetails.message: The provided backup policy is not supported for the ultra Disk or premium ssd v2 disks
recommendedAction: The backup frequency specified in the backup policy is not supported for configuring backups of ultra Disk or premium ssd v2 disks. Please specify a policy with the backup frequency equal to or lower than 4 hours. For more information, please refer to the support matrix on unsupported scenarios and current limitations: https://Sanitized.ms/diskbackupdoc-supportmatrix.

protectionErrorDetails.message: The provided backup policy is not supported for the ultra Disk or premium ssd v2 disks

errorDetails.message: Could not perform the operation as Disk and Snapshot Data store Resource Group no longer exists. Or Azure Backup Service requires additional permissions on the Snapshot Data store Resource Group and Disk to do this operation.
recommendedAction: Please create Resource Group and grant Backup Vault managed identity appropriate permissions on the Snapshot Data store Resource Group. Snapshot Data store Resource Group is the location where the disk snapshots are stored.If the disk is not deleted or moved, grant Backup Vault managed identity appropriate permissions on the Disk.  Refer documentation to understand which is the Resource Group, what permissions are required by the Backup Vault managed identity and how to provide it - https://Sanitized.ms/diskbackupdoc-backup
